description: Auto-emit one Dagster asset per MLflow experiment (recent runs + metrics + params) and per registered model (versions). StateBackedComponent — discovery cached to disk. Materializing an experiment asset fetches recent runs; materializing a model asset fetches model version metadata.

tracking_uri_env_var.label: Tracking URI Env Var
tracking_uri_env_var.description: Env var with the MLflow tracking server URI.

username_env_var.label: Username Env Var
username_env_var.description: Env var with basic auth username (if the server requires auth).

model_selector.label: Model Selector
model_selector.description: Fivetran-shape selector against registered model names.
